title: Chicken Hop
tagline: Why did the chicken hop the road? To get to the other slide!
description: Chicken Hop is a tiny browser arcade game where a brave chicken runs through a cozy house, jumps clutter, grabs corn, and tries to keep both hearts full.
metaDescription: Play Chicken Hop, a free browser arcade game on viggo.games. Jump household obstacles, collect corn, and keep a brave chicken running.

title: Hunter Guy
tagline: What did the hunter say to his snack? Nice to meat you!
description: Hunter Guy is a first-person forest prototype where you walk through the woods, switch tools on a belt, and tag foxes, deer, and bears.
metaDescription: Play Hunter Guy, a free first-person browser forest game on viggo.games with simple keyboard, mouse, and touch controls.

title: Burb
tagline: A small bird, a big road, and very serious steering.
description: Burb is a playful browser cycling game about steering a small bird along a winding 3D road.
metaDescription: Play Burb, a free browser cycling game on viggo.games. Steer a small bird through a winding 3D road.

title: Gunny
tagline: Space is loud. Your blaster is louder.
description: Gunny is a browser space shooter where you fly past Earth and the moon, blast red ships, dodge satellites, and clear the sector.
metaDescription: Play Gunny, a free browser space shooter on viggo.games. Fly past Earth, blast raiders, and avoid satellites.
